title: LLM + Harness Core Capability Roadmap
objective: Make AI Chat a strong general problem-solving agent centered on LLM strengths: durable memory, tool use, planning, retrieval, workspace progress, and truthful execution.

north_star.product_shape: A chat-native assistant that can remember, retrieve, plan, search, act in a workspace, and leave durable artifacts without bluffing capability or losing context.
non_goals: Do not broaden into a full analyst/data-science product before the core coding and problem-solving runtime feels reliable.
Do not depend on chat transcript alone when durable workspace state or compacted memory would be better.

principles: Favor durable workspace state over long in-context recall.
Escalate depth only when the task actually warrants it.
Use tools deliberately and truthfully; never imply a result that was not produced.
Keep chat calm and useful while pushing heavy state into files, memory, and artifacts.
Treat follow-up turns as first-class interactions, not edge cases.

rules: Prefer extending existing runtime seams such as task-state, context assembly, routing, and replay capture instead of creating parallel systems.
When a capability becomes durable, write it into the workspace under .ai/ or another explicit artifact path instead of leaving it only in chat.
If a turn claims a file, artifact, search result, or verification outcome, make sure the runtime can point to the real backing output.
When adding a capability, wire model instructions, runtime policy, artifact surfacing, and tests together as one end-to-end slice.
definition_of_done: A capability has a durable runtime surface, not just a prompt tweak.
The user can observe the result through chat, viewer, workspace artifacts, or explicit status updates.
The failure mode is captured by tests or replay fixtures.
Follow-up turns remain coherent after the new capability lands.

phases.goal: Add real per-conversation compacted memory so the assistant can preserve goals, decisions, active files, and open questions without depending on raw transcript replay.
phases.why_now: This unlocks better follow-ups, better retrieval, and cleaner context windows across the rest of the roadmap.
deliverables: A durable machine-readable conversation memory artifact stored in the workspace.
A compacted memory update path tied to visible chat turns and summary refreshes.
Context assembly that prefers structured conversation memory before raw history search.
acceptance_criteria: A conversation can carry forward pinned goals, decisions, active artifacts, and unresolved questions across many turns.
Short follow-ups no longer require large raw-history retrieval when compacted memory already contains the needed state.
The runtime can inspect and surface the memory artifact for debugging and replay.

phases.goal: Resolve short follow-up turns against prior assistant offers, active task state, and conversation memory so the chat feels natural.
deliverables: A follow-up rewrite / grounding layer before routing.
Shared follow-up intent features used by tool policy, search policy, render policy, and execution routing.
Replay fixtures for ambiguous follow-ups such as yes, do that, show me, save it, look it up, and continue.
acceptance_criteria: Short replies inherit the intended action without topic drift.
Elliptical web/search follow-ups stay attached to the original topic instead of becoming a new literal query.
Observed misses are explainable through triage or replay captures.

phases.goal: Make tool availability, selection, and truthfulness predictable so the model can act confidently without bluffing.
deliverables: Explicit policy helpers for web search, workspace writes, command execution, render/open, and verification.
Observability for why a tool was or was not used.
Truthfulness filters covering files, artifact refs, searches, and verification claims.
acceptance_criteria: Equivalent user intents expose equivalent tool capabilities.
The assistant does not claim to have produced an artifact, search result, or file update unless the runtime can verify it.
Tool gating decisions can be debugged from captures and tests.

phases.goal: Make workspace files and viewer artifacts the durable source of truth whenever the assistant creates or updates something important.
deliverables: Compact artifact objects in chat instead of repeated file dumps.
Reliable file/viewer materialization for code-like responses and other durable outputs.
Cleaner file naming, preview labeling, and artifact metadata.
acceptance_criteria: When the assistant updates a file, the viewer shows the current saved version and chat stays compact.
Explanatory prose never leaks into saved code files.
File surfacing feels intentional rather than generic or duplicated.

phases.goal: Keep search useful by splitting it into strong, narrow lanes instead of one generic search behavior.
deliverables: Distinct handling for direct fact lookup, current docs/source lookup, recommendation/comparison, and broader research.
Direct-answer extraction for fact queries before falling back to result lists.
Follow-up-aware search routing that preserves the active topic.
acceptance_criteria: Current fact queries return short sourced answers instead of generic link dumps.
Search does not hijack coding requests that merely mention websites or APIs.
Short follow-ups like 'can't you see on google?' remain grounded in the prior request.

phases.goal: Use lightweight chat for easy turns and deeper plan/execute/verify loops only when tasks become multi-step, durable, or resumable.
deliverables: Mode auto-selection that remains lightweight by default.
Saved plan/task-board state for deeper tasks.
Replanning when the task changes materially.
acceptance_criteria: Simple chat and fact turns stay fast and conversational.
Multi-step work can pause and resume from durable state without losing the thread.
The user can tell when the runtime escalated depth and why.

phases.goal: Use structured memory and targeted retrieval together so the runtime pulls only the most relevant prior context.
deliverables: Policy that decides when compacted memory is enough and when raw history retrieval is still needed.
Better ranking of retrieved memory slices for corrective follow-ups and long-running tasks.
Evaluation coverage for memory underuse, overuse, and wrong-turn retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: The runtime avoids dragging large history into context when compacted memory already answers the need.
Corrective follow-ups still pull enough raw evidence when necessary.
Memory-related misses appear clearly in triage buckets.

phases.goal: Keep turning real user misses into replayable fixtures and tuning targets so the runtime improves from evidence rather than guesswork.
deliverables: A capture path for misses related to memory, follow-ups, tool choice, and search quality.
Promotion/review workflow for turning bad turns into accepted eval fixtures.
Triage that maps top failure buckets to the roadmap phases they block.
acceptance_criteria: The biggest recurring misses are visible as concrete replay buckets, not anecdotes.
Accepted fixtures become the regression bar for future runtime changes.
Agents can identify which roadmap phase to work on from the captures alone.

immediate_next_actions.task: Create a durable conversation memory artifact under .ai/ that stores goals, decisions, active files, open questions, recent requests, and next steps.
immediate_next_actions.success_signal: A chat can be rehydrated from the memory artifact without depending on raw transcript replay.

immediate_next_actions.task: Teach context assembly to read structured conversation memory first and include it as a ranked section before raw history retrieval.
immediate_next_actions.success_signal: Context bundles for follow-up and planning phases include compacted memory when available.

immediate_next_actions.task: Add replay/eval fixtures for long-running chat continuity and short follow-ups that should be resolved from compacted memory.
immediate_next_actions.success_signal: Context eval coverage fails if memory is missing or ignored in those cases.

immediate_next_actions.task: Add a follow-up rewrite/grounding layer that uses compacted memory plus prior assistant offers to resolve short replies before routing.
immediate_next_actions.success_signal: Elliptical turns like yes, do that, save it, and can't you see on google stay attached to the intended prior action.

immediate_next_actions.task: Add replay fixtures and triage coverage for grounded follow-up rewrites so missed short-turn resolutions show up as explicit failures.
immediate_next_actions.success_signal: Follow-up regressions such as topic drift, wrong tool lane, or missed prior offers are visible in context evals and triage.
